title: frumentum pratense
intro: Frumentum pratense, also known as meadow grass or meadow millet, is a type of grass that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Frumentum pratense include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Frumentum pratense is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture or capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
